rules.rule_text:
rule EnigmaPacker_Rare
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects an ENIGMA packed executable"
		license = "Detection Rule License 1.1 https://github.com/Neo23x0/signature-base/blob/master/LICENSE"
		author = "Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)"
		reference = "Internal Research"
		date = "2017-04-27"
		score = 60
		hash1 = "77be6e80a4cfecaf50d94ee35ddc786ba1374f9fe50546f1a3382883cb14cec9"
		id = "748bc74c-e83f-5740-8ff7-f1371fc22802"

	strings:
		$s1 = "P.rel$oc$" fullword ascii
		$s2 = "ENIGMA" fullword ascii

	condition:
		( uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and filesize < 4000KB and all of them )
}

rule_metadata.name: Enigma_Protected_Malware_May17_RhxFiles
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) with the help of binar.ly

rule_metadata.name: Enigma_Protected_Malware
rule_metadata.description: Detects samples packed by Enigma Protector
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) with the help of binar.ly
